Name: Takuya Yamashiro
Description: Takuya Yamashiro is the Spider-Man of Earth-51778. He was a motocross driver and son of the astrophysicist Dr. Hiroshi Yamashiro. In one of his races, Takuya received telepathic messages from the alien Garia, that lead him to investigate a crashed Ufo, the Marveller. The incident attracted the villain Dr. Monster and his Iron Cross Army. Takuya recieved a transfusion of blood from the alien Garia, and recieved spider-like powers to began a fight against the Iron Cross Army.
